channel.title: Ghostties Beta Releases
channel.description: Beta and stable releases of Ghostties

item.title: Ghostties v0.1.0-beta.16
item.description:
What's new in v0.1.0-beta.16

The tasks sidebar is fully wired up, with six status zones, Linear preset support, and a complete gt CLI.

Added

  • Six-zone task sidebar — Inbox, Backlog, Running, Needs You, Review, Graveyard
  • Linear Sync preset in the New Session template picker
  • Source dots — indigo for Linear tasks, sage for shell tasks
  • set_task_fields MCP tool for agents to write back worktree/PR/branch
  • Sessions recents tab in the sidebar
  • New Session flyout now shows agent templates
  • Wordmark animation for empty terminal panes (opt-in via defaults write)
  • gt smoke subcommand for automated task verification

Fixed

  • "Check for Updates" now shows progress and result in all window styles
  • Auto-update channel controllable via defaults write ghostties.autoUpdateChannel beta
  • gt done is faster with cleaner output

Performance

  • Suppressed 1Hz sidebar re-render when session states haven't changed

Full release notes on GitHub

item.title: Ghostties v0.1.0-beta.15
item.description:
What's new in v0.1.0-beta.15

Polish and stability fixes following the beta.14 smoke test.

Fixed

  • Dark mode titlebar now matches the canvas background color
  • Fullscreen icon position in the toolbar corrected
  • Canvas corner radius is now consistent on all four corners
  • Shadow depth between browser and terminal panels is now consistent
  • Sparkle update toast no longer appears in release builds

Full release notes on GitHub
